$schema_comment: Hooks that automate verification. The harness executes them, not the agent, so they cannot be bypassed.

hooks.description: After editing or writing files, runs the tests and shows the summary.

hooks.command: ./init.sh > /tmp/harness_init.log 2>&1 && echo '[harness] init.sh OK' || (echo '[harness] init.sh FAILED — check /tmp/harness_init.log before closing' && cat /tmp/harness_init.log | tail -20)
hooks.description: Before closing the session, forces a full verification.
